editableNewDialogue.text:
Translate

「ポスターを貼ったはいいけど、テープが剝がれなくてベタベタになった…」
"Putting up the poster was fine, but the tape wouldn’t come off and it got all sticky..."

Translate

「今日のパン、燃えたから焦げ香しいんじゃなくて炎の匂いがする」
"Today’s bread isn’t ‘nicely toasted’—it smells like actual fire."

Translate

「ウミガメは海に戻すより、まず田んぼの立入禁止看板を洗ってくれ」
"Rather than returning the sea turtle to the ocean, first go clean the ‘No Entry’ sign by the rice field."

Translate

「1983年にフランスでマスコットキャラが結成された，っていう架空の年表を作ってみた」
"I tried making a fictional timeline where a mascot character was created in France in 1983."

Translate

「アカウント、また買い替えちゃったので、翻訳履歴ごっそり消えたｗ」
"I ended up switching accounts again, so my translation history got completely wiped lol."

That line I sent about “If anyone wants to wear it, I want to take photos like this” — that was just me translating someone else’s post.
I’m not actually looking for people to wear my costumes or do collaborative cosplay photo shoots.

Got it — so it wasn’t your personal desire, just a quoted/translated caption.
So we shouldn’t treat it as your own interest in arranging collaborative cosplay photography.

turns.text:
That line I sent about “If anyone wants to wear it, I want to take photos like this” — that was just me translating someone else’s post.
I’m not actually looking for people to wear my costumes or do collaborative cosplay photo shoots.

editableUpdatedMemories.label: Preferences/Entertainment
editableUpdatedMemories.reasoning: The old memory inferred an ongoing interest in collaborative cosplay photography from a sentence that was actually a translation of someone else’s post. The user clarifies it is not their own preference and they are not seeking collaborative cosplay photo shoots.
editableUpdatedMemories.value: Not interested in arranging collaborative cosplay photo shoots or having others wear their costumes

annotation.queryText: I’m deciding whether to go alone or reach out in advance for a meetup at an upcoming costume/photo event. Given what you know about the kinds of shoots I’m most excited by, which option would make more sense for me—and why?
